channel.title: Colorado - Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!
channel.description: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!
channel.copyright: Copyright © Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion! 2026
channel.managingEditor: paul@beeramerica.tv (Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!)

image.title: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

channel.itunes:summary: Beer America TV is the first beer web site dedicated to the specialty craft brewing world with video on industry experts and insiders plus more!
channel.itunes:author: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

itunes:owner.itunes:name: Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!

item.title: Left Hand Brewing: Milk Stout Nitro, Ep. 183
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we explore the beauty and awesomeness of Nitro! Left Hand Brewing is the first to capture the magic in a bottle with their Milk Stout Nitro . The Nitro version is the exact same recipe as the original Milk Stout, however the flavors are more malt forward and the […]

The post Left Hand Brewing: Milk Stout Nitro, Ep. 183 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Oskar Blues and Sun King: Chaka, Ep. 170
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America TV loves collaboration beers, but this week is extra special featuring a CANlaboration! Leave it to the craft-beer-in-a-can innovators Oskar Blues Brewery, to team up with Sun King Brewing Company, to produce the first American Craft beer in a re-sealable can!! Chaka is a Belgian Style Ale brewed with Shagbark Hickory Syrup and […]

The post Oskar Blues and Sun King: Chaka, Ep. 170 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Avery Brewing Company: Avery IPA, Ep. 155
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
OK, so we shot a handful of green screen episodes, we have to edit them! This week on Beer America TV we tackle another IPA, this time from Avery Brewing . Avery IPA is an excellent IPA with a nice malt balance. If you’re looking for an IPA that’s not to bitter and a session […]

The post Avery Brewing Company: Avery IPA, Ep. 155 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Ska Brewing Company: Pinstripe Red Ale, Ep. 152
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we continue our goofy green screen series with Ska Brewing Company’s Pinstripe Red Ale. This one is another great example of how Ska is separating themselves from the pack by brewing bold beers that are unique in flavor for their category! Pinstripe Red is brewed with caramel malts and […]

The post Ska Brewing Company: Pinstripe Red Ale, Ep. 152 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: New Belgium Abbey – Ep. 151
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America TV has reviewed several beers from New Belgium and it’s always a treat to say the least! This week we dive into New Belgiums Abbey, which is a Belgian dubbel (or double) brewed with six different malts and an authentic Belgian yeast strain. Abbey is bottle-conditioned and the Winner of four World Beer […]

The post New Belgium Abbey – Ep. 151 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: 2011 Great American Beer Festival Highlights
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
Beer America had a great week at the Great American Beer Festival in Denver . Our primary reason for being there was to shoot the second installment of Beer America the TV series for Paul, and John was there once again as a judge and Brewers Association Board member. Neither of us had a lot […]

The post 2011 Great American Beer Festival Highlights first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Breckenridge SummerBright Ale, Ep. 147
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
As summer comes to a close, now is the best time to sample what’s left of the summer brews on your beer store’s shelf. This week, Beer America TV talks about SummerBright Ale from the Breckenridge Brewery in Denver, Colorado . Crisp and clean with a low abv puts this summer ale on the list […]

The post Breckenridge SummerBright Ale, Ep. 147 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.

item.title: Stone Brewing: Sublimely Self-Righteous Ale, Ep. 129
item.dc:creator: Paul
item.description:
This week on Beer America TV we tackle another big dog on the American Craft Brewing scene! The folks at Stone Brewing are not self conscious, shy, unassuming, or uncertain of much, so that’s why their Sublimely Self-Righteous Ale is up front and in your face the minute you open the bottle . Described as […]

The post Stone Brewing: Sublimely Self-Righteous Ale, Ep. 129 first appeared on Beer America TV - Craft Beer in Motion!.
